    readLength() {
        let shift = 0;
        let byte = this.readUint8();
        let value = (byte & 127) << shift;
        while (byte > 127) {
            shift += 7;
            byte = this.readUint8();
            value = value + ((byte & 127) << shift);
        }
        return value;
    }

        const length = this.readLength();

        const result = this.buffer.slice(sliceOffset, sliceOffset + length);
